message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Croatian parliamentary elections 2000","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13552","justification":"Study of the 2000 Croatian parliamentary elections; includes information on parliamentary politics and is situated at the start of the 2000s period requested."},{"title":"Croatian parliamentary election study 2003","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13553","justification":"Election study focusing on the 2003 Croatian parliamentary elections; covers attitudes and behavior related to parliamentary representation in the 2000s."},{"title":"Croatian parliamentary election study 2007","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13554","justification":"Provides data on the 2007 parliamentary elections in Croatia, relevant to the political context of parliamentary debates in the late 2000s."},{"title":"Croatian parliamentary election study 2011","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13555","justification":"Covers the 2011 parliamentary elections in Croatia; while focused on elections, it provides context on parliamentary composition and debate for the early 2010s."},{"title":"Croatian parliamentary election study 2015","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13556","justification":"Dataset on the 2015 Croatian parliamentary elections, relevant to the structure and issues of parliamentary politics in the mid‑2010s."},{"title":"Croatian parliamentary election study 2016","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13557","justification":"Election study for the 2016 parliamentary elections in Croatia, providing information on parties and parliamentary representation in the 2010s."},{"title":"Croatian parliamentary election study 2020","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.14043","justification":"Dataset on the 2020 parliamentary elections in Croatia; provides contemporary information on parties and parliamentary dynamics in the 2020s."},{"title":"Candidates for the Parliament of Croatia in 2015 – content analysis of election manifestos","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13558","justification":"Content analysis of candidates’ manifestos for the 2015 parliamentary election; closely related to parliamentary debate themes and issue framing in Croatia during the 2010s."},{"title":"Candidates for the Parliament of Croatia in 2016 – content analysis of election manifestos","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13559","justification":"Analyzes content of 2016 parliamentary candidates’ manifestos; relevant to understanding topics and positions that later structure parliamentary debates in Croatia in the 2010s."},{"title":"Candidates for the Parliament of Croatia in 2020 – content analysis of election manifestos","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.14044","justification":"Content analysis of candidates’ manifestos for the 2020 parliamentary election; pertinent to the themes and issues likely to feature in parliamentary debates in Croatia in the 2020s."}]}
